response_text:
ENTITY Airport
PK airport_code
ATTR airport_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airport_name : varchar
ATTR location_code : varchar
ATTR city : varchar

ENTITY City
PK city_code
ATTR city_code : varchar : PK
ATTR city_name : varchar

ENTITY Airline
PK airline_code
ATTR airline_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airline_name : varchar

ENTITY Aircraft
PK aircraft_reg
ATTR aircraft_reg : varchar : PK
ATTR aircraft_model : varchar

ENTITY Flight
PK flight_number
ATTR flight_number : varchar : PK
ATTR departure_date : date
ATTR departure_time : time
ATTR arrival_date : date
ATTR arrival_time : time
ATTR flight_status : varchar

ENTITY CrewMember
PK crew_id
ATTR crew_id : varchar : PK
ATTR crew_name : varchar
ATTR crew_surname : varchar
ATTR crew_role : varchar

ENTITY FlightLeg
PK flight_number, departure_date, departure_airport_code, arrival_airport_code
ATTR flight_number : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR departure_date : date : PK
ATTR departure_airport_code : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR arrival_airport_code : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR departure_time : time
ATTR arrival_time : time
ATTR scheduled_time : time
ATTR flight_status : varchar

REL FlightLeg -> Flight : 1 -> 1 : FK=flight_number
REL FlightLeg -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=departure_airport_code
REL FlightLeg -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=arrival_airport_code
REL FlightLeg -> City : 1 -> 1 : FK=departure_city_code
REL FlightLeg -> City : 1 -> 1 : FK=arrival_city_code
REL FlightLeg -> Airline : 1 -> 1 : FK=airline_code
REL FlightLeg -> Aircraft : 1 -> 1 : FK=aircraft_reg
